# BP-102 negative: the error path writes an explicit HTTP error response.
lang: go
file: BP-102-safe.go
variant: stdlib
---
package sample

import "net/http"

func serve(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
	payload, err := loadPayload(r)
	if err != nil {
		http.Error(w, "could not load payload", http.StatusInternalServerError)
		return
	}
	w.Write(payload)
}

func loadPayload(*http.Request) ([]byte, error) { return []byte("ok"), nil }
